personal.name: Gummadi Siddhartha
personal.about: Computer Science student at AVN Institute of Engineering and Technology. Focused on Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Software Engineering — passionate about building intelligent systems and scalable applications.
personal.bio: I'm a dedicated Computer Science Engineering student with a specialization in AI & ML. I'm building a strong foundation in core programming, algorithms, and system design, with a goal of leveraging technology to solve complex problems and drive innovation.

education.institution: AVN Institute of Engineering and Technology, Ibrahimpatnam, Hyderabad
education.description: Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering, specializing in AI and Machine Learning. Focused on mastering core concepts in data science, intelligent systems, and scalable software architecture.

education.institution: Vidya Vikas Junior College, Bodhan, Nizamabad
education.description: Completed higher secondary education with a focus on Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry. Developed strong analytical and problem-solving skills, laying a solid foundation for future engineering studies and technical development.

Successfully completed secondary education with a strong academic record. This formative period cultivated my initial interest in science and technology, encouraging a disciplined approach to learning and academic excellence.

projects.name: SmartClass
projects.description: A full-stack smart attendance management system featuring QR code scanning, face recognition, role-based dashboards for admin/teacher/student, and Excel & PDF report generation.

projects.name: Dhruva
projects.description: A premium, wellness-grade AI guide grounded in ancient wisdom. Features a custom deep-space UI, session history, native performance metrics, and intelligent dharmic guidance powered by the Gemini API.

projects.name: HQC-MDF
projects.description: A hybrid classical-quantum engine featuring an automated diagnostic pipeline, real-time benchmarking, and professional medical report generation in PDF format for clinical diagnostics.
